HMAC.max_bits: 2^64 for SHA1/SHA224/SHA256, 2^128 for SHA384/SHA512, unlimited for SHA3

semantic.description: Check whether a CRYPT_PKEY_AlgId value is a supported asymmetric algorithm.

returns.true_if: id is a valid asymmetric algorithm identifier

semantic.description: Allocate a new asymmetric key context for the specified algorithm.
semantic.ctx_lifetime: allocated by CRYPT_EAL_PkeyNewCtx, freed by CRYPT_EAL_PkeyFreeCtx

semantic.description: Allocate a new asymmetric key context from a provider for the specified algorithm and operation type.
semantic.ctx_lifetime: allocated by CRYPT_EAL_ProviderPkeyNewCtx, freed by CRYPT_EAL_PkeyFreeCtx

semantic.description: Copy key material and parameters from one CRYPT_EAL_PkeyCtx to another pre-allocated context.
semantic.ctx_lifetime: both contexts must be managed by caller; no allocation inside
constraints: to and from must share identical key management / provider backend

semantic.description: Allocate and return a deep copy of an existing CRYPT_EAL_PkeyCtx.
semantic.ctx_lifetime: new context must be freed with CRYPT_EAL_PkeyFreeCtx

semantic.description: Free a CRYPT_EAL_PkeyCtx and associated key material; pointer is set to NULL by caller.
Attach explicit algorithm parameters (domain parameters) to a key context.
semantic.effect: Configures domain parameters for later key generation or key import.

semantic.description: Set algorithm parameters on a key context using a BSL_Param parameter list.
semantic.effect: Supplies domain parameters (curve id, modulus, generator, etc.) according to algorithm type.

semantic.description: Export algorithm parameters from a key context into a CRYPT_EAL_PkeyPara structure.
Attach pre-defined algorithm parameters to a key context using a CRYPT_PKEY_ParaId identifier.
semantic.effect: Selects standard DH/ECC/XMSS/etc parameter sets for later key generation or import.

semantic.description: Generate an asymmetric key pair in the given context using its configured algorithm and parameters.
semantic.effect: Populates internal public/private key material for subsequent sign/encrypt/exchange operations.

semantic.description: Import a public key into a key context from a CRYPT_EAL_PkeyPub structure.
semantic.effect: Sets or replaces the public key component in pkey; caller owns the input structure memory.

semantic.description: Import a public key into a key context from a BSL_Param parameter list.
semantic.effect: Configures the public key in pkey based on provider- or algorithm-specific parameters.

semantic.description: Import a private key into a key context from a CRYPT_EAL_PkeyPrv structure.
semantic.effect: Sets or replaces the private key component in pkey; caller owns the input structure memory.

semantic.description: Import a private key into a key context from a BSL_Param parameter list.
semantic.effect: Configures the private key in pkey based on provider- or algorithm-specific parameters.

semantic.description: Export the public key from a key context into a CRYPT_EAL_PkeyPub structure.
Export the public key from a key context into a BSL_Param parameter list.
Export the private key from a key context into a CRYPT_EAL_PkeyPrv structure.
Export the private key from a key context into a BSL_Param parameter list.
Sign input message data using the private key in pkey; hashes internally with the specified MD algorithm where applicable.
Verify a signature over message data using the public key in pkey; hashes internally with the specified MD algorithm where applicable.

returns.failure: signature invalid or other error, see crypt_errno.h

semantic.description: Sign a precomputed hash value using the private key in pkey.
Verify a signature over a precomputed hash value using the public key in pkey.

returns.failure: signature invalid or other error, see crypt_errno.h

semantic.description: Encrypt data using the public key component of pkey (e.g. RSA, ElGamal, KEM-wrapped schemes).
Decrypt data using the private key component of pkey (e.g. RSA, ElGamal, Paillier).
Perform homomorphic addition on ciphertext inputs (e.g. Paillier) using the key in pkey.
Perform homomorphic multiplication or scalar multiplication on ciphertext inputs using the key in pkey.
Check whether the public and private key contexts correspond to a valid key pair.
constraints: pubKey and prvKey must share identical key management / provider backend

returns.failure: keys mismatch or other error, see crypt_errno.h

semantic.description: Check structural validity of a private key (parameter consistency, ranges, etc.).

returns.failure: invalid key or other error, see crypt_errno.h

semantic.description: Compute a shared secret using own private key in pkey and a peer public key context.

shared_secret.length_relation: must be >= CRYPT_EAL_PkeyGetKeyLen(pkey) or algorithm-specific size

semantic.description: Return key length in bytes for the given key context.
Return the estimated security strength of the key in bits (for RSA/ECDSA).

returns.zero_if: pkey is NULL or algorithm unsupported

semantic.description: Return the nominal key size in bits for the given key context.
Return the maximum signature length in bytes supported by this key context.

returns.zero_if: pkey is NULL or not a signing algorithm

semantic.description: Generic control interface for algorithm-specific or provider-specific options on a key context.

returns.failure: see crypt_errno.h for specific option errors

semantic.description: Apply a blinding transformation to input data (typically for RSA BSSA) using information from the key context.
Remove blinding from previously blinded data using the key context.
Return the CRYPT_PKEY_AlgId for this key context.
Return the CRYPT_PKEY_ParaId currently associated with this key context, if any.
Compare two key contexts (keys or parameters) for equality.

returns.failure: keys/parameters differ or an error occurs, see crypt_errno.h

semantic.description: Attach arbitrary user-defined data pointer to a key context.
Retrieve previously stored user-defined data pointer from a key context.

returns.null_if: no data stored or pkey is NULL

semantic.description: Increment the reference count of a key context at the EAL layer.
Initialize a key encapsulation (KEM) context for encapsulation using the public component of pkey.
Initialize a key encapsulation (KEM) context for decapsulation using the private component of pkey.
Perform key encapsulation to produce a KEM ciphertext and shared secret.
Perform key decapsulation to derive the shared secret from a KEM ciphertext.
